evals.expected_output: Creates meeting file in Acme Corp account folder, updates daily note with full-path links and 4-item checklist
expectations: Account name parsed as 'Acme Corp', topic as 'Experimentation Sync'
Meeting file created at {config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync.md
Frontmatter has account, date, gong_url, and empty attendees array
File contains all sections: Tasks, Summary, Attendees, New Customer Contacts, Notes, External Summary, Transcript
Daily note updated with FULL PATH links (not short links)
Account link format: [[{config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/Acme Corp|Acme Corp]]
Meeting link format: [[{config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync|YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync]]
All 4 checklist items present: Gong Transcript, /ld-summarize-account, /ld-salesforce, stakeholders
Gong URL pulled from account frontmatter
AE and CSM names pulled from account frontmatter for stakeholders line
No blank line between heading and first bullet

evals.expected_output: Creates meeting with default topic 'Call' when no topic specified
Creates past meeting file, does NOT update daily note
expectations: Output confirms it was not added to daily note
